title: gentianella lutescens subsp. carpatica
intro: Gentianella lutescens subsp. carpatica, also known as Alpine Yellow Gentian, is a small, perennial plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds, which have been employed to stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The health benefits of Gentianella lutescens subsp. carpatica include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Gentianella lutescens subsp. carpatica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating.
